structure.title: 1st Major: Aerospace Science and Earth Informatics

children.title: Elective Courses
children.note: Students are required to take a total of 21 units of elective courses from the area which corresponds to the 2nd Major chosen by them. 6-9 units to be taken from Group A, and 12-15 units from Group B, of which at least 15 units of courses should be from 2000 or above level. Among the 15 units of courses, 9 units of courses should be from 3000 or above level (including at least 6 units of courses at 4000 level). Areas
